output_schema.artifact_markdown: The investigative brief: narrowed topic, central claim, evidence inventory, gaps, and angle options
output_schema.resumo: 2-3 sentence summary of the brief, the identified gap, or the blocker question
output_schema.self_check: Bullet list validating the brief against evidence requirements, gap analysis, and Wolven positioning
output_schema.blocker_question: One highest-impact question when supplied material is too thin; omitted when brief is complete
